name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers secured car title pledges and unsecured flex lines of credit with same-day funding. Most credit types accepted; vehicle title used as collateral.
description_long:
TitleMax is one of the largest title lending companies in the United States, with this Summer Avenue location in Memphis, Tennessee having served the local community since February 2007. The company operates stores across multiple states and offers both in-store and online lending products. The Memphis location is bilingual and has accumulated over 481 Google reviews with a 5.0/5 average rating, suggesting consistent customer service at this branch.

TitleMax offers two distinct product lines at this location. The first is a Title Pledge & Flex Line of Credit, which is a secured product using the borrower's vehicle title as collateral. Applicants need a clear vehicle title and a valid government-issued ID. Approval considers the vehicle's value, the amount requested, and the applicant's ability to repay. The second product is an Unsecured Flexible Line of Credit, available both in-store and online. The online version is restricted to residents of Arizona, Delaware, Idaho, Kansas, Missouri, Mississippi, South Carolina, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, and Wisconsin, and requires an active bank account statement and proof of income.

Several features distinguish TitleMax from traditional lenders. Because the loan is secured by a vehicle title, TitleMax accepts most credit types — including poor credit — making it accessible to borrowers who cannot qualify elsewhere. Borrowers keep driving their vehicle while the loan is active. The flex line of credit structure allows customers to draw funds as needed up to a credit limit rather than taking a single lump sum, which provides repayment flexibility. The Summer Avenue store has been operating for nearly two decades and offers bilingual service, which serves a broader segment of the Memphis community.

Consumers should approach title loans with caution. TitleMax does not publish specific APRs or fee schedules on this store page, but title loans industry-wide routinely carry triple-digit annual percentage rates. Defaulting on a title loan puts the borrower's vehicle at risk of repossession, which can compound a financial crisis significantly. This product is appropriate as a short-term emergency measure only when lower-cost alternatives — such as credit union payday alternative loans, CDFI loans, or employer advances — have been exhausted or are unavailable.
address: 829 N Belt Line Rd, Irving, TX 75061

company_info.headquarters: 829 N Belt Line Rd, Irving, TX 75061

pros: Same-day cash available upon approval — no waiting period
Most credit types accepted; vehicle value helps secure the loan rather than credit score alone
Flex line of credit lets borrowers draw funds over time rather than taking a single lump sum
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle while the loan is outstanding
Bilingual staff at this Memphis location
Store open since February 2007 — established local presence with 481+ Google reviews at 5.0/5
Unsecured line of credit available online in 11 states for borrowers without a vehicle title
cons: APRs and fee schedules are not disclosed on the store page — borrowers must inquire directly
Vehicle title is pledged as collateral; default risks repossession of the borrower's car
Online unsecured line of credit restricted to 11 states only
Store closed Sundays; limited Saturday hours (9am–4pm)
A credit check is performed despite marketing that accepts most credit types
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear car title who need fast cash and have poor or no credit history
Borrowers who have been declined by traditional lenders and need same-day funding
Consumers in Tennessee who want a revolving credit line rather than a fixed lump-sum loan
Memphis-area residents who prefer in-person service with bilingual support
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for vehicle owners with a clear title who face an immediate cash emergency and cannot qualify for lower-cost lending options. The main caveat is that title loans typically carry very high APRs and place the borrower's vehicle at direct risk of repossession upon default — this should be a last-resort product, not a routine borrowing tool.
services: Car title pledge loans (secured by vehicle title)
Flex Line of Credit (secured, revolving — draw as needed up to credit limit)
Online unsecured line of credit (11 states)
Credit check with acceptance of most credit types
Vehicle value assessment for loan sizing
Ability to retain vehicle use during loan term
